title: Bolt.Works - We're looking for construction professionals to work in Finland, Suomi
salary_range: salary expectations, along with a brief justifi
meta_description: Join Bolt.Works Oy as a Bolt.Works - We're looking for construction professionals to work in Finland, Suomi and grow your career in Helsinki.
description: Bolt.Works is seeking skilled construction professionals with experience in Finland to join our team. We are offering competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements and provide a permanent position. Applicants should have strong professional skills within the construction industry, including expertise in concrete work, roofing, scaffolding, or similar fields. Projects will be agreed upon based on client needs and project timelines, allowing flexibility depending on availability and preferences. Projects may be located anywhere in Finland, with applicants able to specify location preferences. We expect candidates to have a solid work experience and strong professional skills within the construction industry.

Strong professional skills within the construction industry

title: Disc processing center and laser programmer (unloader)
salary_range: Salary according to your experience (Technology industry
meta_description: Take the next step in your career as a Disc processing center and laser programmer (unloader) at Steelcomp Vaasa Oy, located in Vaasa.
description: Steelcomp Vaasa Oy is seeking a Disc Processing Center and Laser Programmer (Unloader) for their growing contract manufacturing company in the metal sector. This role involves programming sheet machining centers and laser cutting machines to optimize material use and production efficiency, with a focus on Finnish and English language skills. Previous experience in similar tasks, knowledge of technical documentation and drawings, disc manufacturing technology, and programming experience are all required. The position offers daily work in one shift, significant responsibility within a growing company, a competent team environment, the opportunity to develop skills at the heart of modern production, and competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: You have previous experience in similar tasks and a good understanding of technical documentation and drawings
Good knowledge of disc manufacturing technology, previous programming experience and disc work center / laser user experience is an advantage
Good knowledge of Finnish and English. Your English doesn't have to be perfect, but at least you use it boldly
job_responsibilities: You play an important role starting from the first stages of our production, determining the timely programming of our sheet machining centers and laser cutting machines, taking into account the best possible material use planning
In your work, you will not only program our laser and combi machines for cutting, but also demolition robot of the latest technology
what_we_offer: Everyday work in one shift
A significant role in a growing and stable company
A competent and supportive team around you
The opportunity to develop your skills at the heart of modern production
Salary according to your experience (Technology industry test)
Were you interested?
search_keywords: disc processing center, laser programmer, engraver, plate machining, metal sector, versatile steel sheet components

title: Production Operator
company: Easpring Finland New Materials Oy, Kotka
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Take the next step in your career as a Production Operator (fixed-term temporary contract) at Easpring Finland New Materials Oy, Kotka, located in Kotka.
description: We are looking for Production Operators with previous experience from a cathode active material (CAM) production plant to join our manufacturing team in Kotka. This fixed-term contract position ensures the successful launch of sample run and commercial production at the Kotka plant, requiring hands-on training for new operators who lack CAM industry experience. Key responsibilities include operating equipment, ensuring product quality, providing safety guidance, maintaining a clean work environment, meeting daily targets, handling materials responsibly, and complying with HSE requirements. The role aligns with TVL level 1 and 2 under the Chemical industry's collective agreement, offering competitive hourly wages based on Finnish collective agreements.
what_we_expect: At least 1-2 years of experience from a similar role within a CAM manufacturer.
English skills are required, other language skills considered to be an asset. Our company language is English.
Ability to follow instructions and quality procedures carefully.
Responsible, safety-minded, and detail-oriented.
Team player with good communication skills.
job_responsibilities: Operate production equipment and follow Safety Standard Operating Procedures (SSOPs).
Ensure product quality and complete production records accurately.
Guide and provide hands-on training to Production Operators who don't have previous work experience from the CAM plant.
what_we_offer: Join Easpring Finland and be a part of building a new generation of sustainable battery materials manufacturing in Europe!
Comply with all Health, Safety, and Environmental (HSE) requirements.
Position: Production Operator
search_keywords: Production Operator, CAM plant, Kotka, Finland, job description

title: Kindergarten director
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
meta_description: Viitasaaren kaupunki is looking for a skilled Kindergarten director in Viitasaari. Don't miss this opportunity—apply today.
description: Kindergarten directors in Viitasaari play a crucial role by managing the early childhood education units according to pedagogical, financial, and operational goals. The ideal candidate for this position should be an enthusiastic pedagogical and administrative professional with experience as a daycare manager. They must possess skills in organizing, making decisions, interacting constructively, and positively influencing staff development. A strong background in childcare management is highly valued. This role offers the opportunity to influence early childhood education management teams while providing excellent benefits such as ePassi well-being support and a supportive work community. The salary and other terms of employment are determined by OVTES.
what_we_expect: Experienced daycare manager
Pedagogical and administrative management skills
Ability to develop staff skills
job_responsibilities: Managing the early childhood education unit in accordance with pedagogical, financial and operational goals
Supervising family daycare units and workers
what_we_offer: Cozy and modern rural town setting
EPassi well-being benefit
Good support from the work community
search_keywords: kindergarten director, daycare manager, early childhood education, pedagogical management, administrative management, family daycare, Viitasaari, childcare, child care, kindergarten, early childhood education staffing, rural town setting
